chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D - 1291 of 2023. 1.For orders on CMA 6433/2023. 2.For orders on o/obj.at Flag.A. 3.For orders on CMA 5491/2023. 4.For Hearing of main case. - 17.10.2023. Mr. Ajeebulalh Junejo Advocate for Petitioner. - 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted, subject to all just exceptions. 4. The Petitioner seeks his appointment as a teacher with the Education Department on the basis of a recruitment process said to have carried out as far back as the year 2012. No proper explanation has been given regarding the time that has elapsed since. Nor has any document been placed on record to show the Petitioners participation in the process and his entitlement arising therefrom. Indeed, the only material placed on record are certain documents relating to the Petitioner’s academic credentials, which are of no consequence per se. Under the circumstances, the petition is found to suffer from by laches and even otherwise be devoid of substance. That being so, the same accordingly stands dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
